recommendations.title: Maléfique
recommendations.overview: Four prisoners discover a handwritten book of black magic in their cell, and decide to use it to escape.

recommendations.title: The Guilty

recommendations.title: The Arctic Convoy
recommendations.overview: In 1942, a convoy of 35 civilian ships, carrying vital supplies from Iceland to the Soviet Union, faces deadly challenges in the Arctic. Despite Allied naval escort, catastrophic intelligence errors expose the convoy to relentless German air and nava

recommendations.title: Paul, Apostle of Christ
recommendations.overview: Risking his life, Luke ventures to Rome to visit Paul -- the apostle who's bound in chains and held captive in Nero's darkest and bleakest prison cell. Haunted by the shadows of his past misdeeds, Paul wonders if he's been forgotten as he awaits his

recommendations.title: The Darkest Hour
recommendations.overview: In Moscow, five young people lead the charge against an alien race which has attacked Earth via our power supply.

recommendations.title: Thank You for Your Service
recommendations.overview: A group of U.S. soldiers returning from Iraq struggle to integrate back into family and civilian life, while living with the memory of a war that threatens to destroy them long after they've left the battlefield.

recommendations.title: Last Breath
recommendations.overview: A commercial diver is stranded on the seabed with only five minutes of oxygen supply, but with no chance of rescue for more than 30 minutes. With access to amazing archival footage, this is the true story of one man’s impossible fight for survival.

recommendations.title: Sea Fever
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Horror, Drama, Science Fiction, Mystery
recommendations.overview: The crew of a West of Ireland trawler—marooned at sea—struggle for their lives against a growing parasite in their water supply.

recommendations.title: 47 Meters Down: Uncaged

recommendations.title: Greyhound
